name: Grilled Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
DRESSING
1/4 cup Balsamic/red wine vinegar
1 tablespoon Dijon mustard
2 cloves Garlic, minced
1/2 teaspoon Salt
1/2 teaspoon Pepper
1/3 cup Fresh basil, chopped
1/2 cup Olive oil
Grill Preparation:
Cut eggplant into 1-inch thick slices. Place in a colander and sprinkle each layer lightly with salt. Let drain for 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, grill red and yellow peppers on a greased grill over medium-high heat, turning often, for 10 minutes or until roasted. Let cool.
Peel, seed, and cut into 1-inch squares. Place in a large bowl.
Cut zucchini and onion into 1/2-inch thick slices; set aside separately.
Trim the ends of mushroom stems. Rinse eggplant under cold water and pat thoroughly dry.
Lightly brush vegetables with oil. Grill mushrooms and onion, turning occasionally, for 8-10 minutes. Grill zucchini and eggplant for 10 minutes or until tender-crisp. Halve zucchini, quarter onions, and cube eggplant slices; add to peppers along with mushrooms.
Combine the dressing ingredients in a bowl. Whisk together vinegar, mustard, garlic, salt, and pepper. Gradually whisk in basil and oil.
Pour over vegetables and toss gently to coat. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours or up to 8 hours.
Bring to room temperature before serving. Garnish with tomato and olives.
